# API and Integration Quality Checklist: Mapeamento de Chamados da API

**Purpose**: Auto-avaliação da qualidade dos requisitos de API PostgREST e integração de chamados do LampexControl
**Created**: 2026-07-06
**Feature**: [spec.md](file:///C:/Users/josue/OneDrive/Documentos/Jramso/Node/Ts/LampexControl/lampex-control/specs/002-api-client-mapping/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are the exact request schemas and parameters defined for the `/solicitacao_monitoria` and `/rpc/submit_weekly_report` endpoints? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001, §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK002 Does the spec define all mandatory properties and data formats for the activities collection payload? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK003 Are the returned data fields for the `/view_heatmap_disponibilidade` aggregated query explicitly listed? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK004 Is the verification criteria for a "Confirmed" called status clearly defined before exposing contact details? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK005 Are student input validation formats (e.g. 11-digit CPF) specified in the requirements? [Clarity, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK006 Is "prominent display" for WhatsApp links defined with measurable visual/interaction requirements? [Clarity, Spec §User Story 3]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK007 Do student contact fields align consistently between the creation flow and the inquiry flow? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 1, §User Story 3]
- [ ] CHK008 Are the role permissions (aluno, monitor, gestor) defined consistently across all data retrieval requirements? [Consistency, Spec §FR-002, §FR-005]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK009 Is the success metric "complete in under 3 minutes" quantified with specific, verifiable steps? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK010 Is the heatmap rendering target of "under 1.5 seconds" measurable and verifiable? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-003]

## Scenario & Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK011 Are requirements defined for when the PDF Proex link is empty, malformed, or unreachable? [Coverage, Edge Case]
- [ ] CHK012 Does the spec specify the behavior when a student queries the contact info for a non-existent protocol ID? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK013 Is the system behavior specified when a monitor updates availability while a coordinator is querying the heatmap? [Coverage, Spec §FR-004]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
